gate.title: Complete preorder first
gate.checking: Checking the current preorder periods. Normal order checkout is temporarily locked.
gate.unavailable: The preorder status cannot be confirmed. You may keep adding items, but retry before checkout.
gate.pending: This store has {{count}} preorder period(s) to complete. You may add items and edit quantities, but cannot submit a normal order yet.
gate.dialogMessage: This store has {{count}} preorder period(s) to submit. You may browse, add items, and edit quantities, but cannot submit a normal order yet.

list.title: Preorder
list.subtitle: Complete every active period to resume normal ordering
list.loadFailedDescription: The network or service is unavailable. Normal ordering remains locked to prevent missed orders.
list.completedDescription: This store has no pending periods and may continue normal ordering.
list.selectStoreDescription: Return to Products, select a store, then open preorder again.

detail.title: Preorder details
detail.noItemsDescription: Contact the warehouse administrator to check this activation.
detail.missingContextDescription: Open the preorder again from the current store's list.
detail.loadFailedDescription: The current items cannot be loaded. Normal ordering remains locked; please retry.
detail.returnedDescription: Review the order, make the requested changes, and submit it again.

readOnlyReason.scheduled: This period has not started yet.
readOnlyReason.closed: The warehouse has closed this period.
readOnlyReason.cancelled: The warehouse has cancelled this period.
readOnlyReason.unavailable: This period is not active and cannot be edited.

leave.notActiveMessage: This period has ended or closed, so unsaved changes can no longer be saved. Stay to review them, or discard the changes and leave.
leave.unsavedMessage: The draft cannot be saved right now. Stay and retry, or explicitly discard the unsaved changes and leave.

conflict.title: Draft changed on another device
conflict.message: Use the latest server draft, or keep this device's entries and retry with the latest revision.
conflict.submitMessage: This submission was cancelled because the draft changed on another device. Use the latest server draft, or keep this device's entries and save with the latest revision, then submit again.
conflict.alreadySubmitted: This period was completed on another device and has been refreshed.

submit.pendingMessage: Wait for submission to finish before leaving this page so the order status remains clear.
submit.confirmMessage: Submit {{sku}} SKUs and {{quantity}} units. The store cannot edit after submission.
submit.noDemandMessage: Every pack count is zero. Confirm that this store needs nothing this period?
submit.nextMessage: “{{name}}” is still pending. Continue to the next period.
submit.completedMessage: All active preorders are complete. Normal ordering is available again.
submit.refreshFailedMessage: This period was submitted, but the remaining periods could not be refreshed. Normal ordering stays locked; return to the list and retry.

errors.draftConflict: Another device changed this draft. Choose which version to keep.
errors.conflictRefreshFailed: The draft conflicted, but the latest server version could not be loaded. Check the network and retry.
errors.notActive: This period has ended or not started. Refresh the list.
errors.required: A preorder still needs to be completed.
